narrative.description: The Witness is an open-world puzzle game set on a mysterious island where line-drawing panels encode rules that must be learned and applied across hundreds of environmental puzzles.
narrative.core_loop: Explore biomes freely, discover panel puzzles, infer rules from environmental clues, and unlock new areas by mastering progressively harder rule sets.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Witness, players collect clues and deduce correct answers from constrained evidence sets.
mechanics.expression: In The Witness, players collect clues and deduce correct answers from constrained evidence sets.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Witness, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.
mechanics.expression: In The Witness, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Witness, interconnected rooms hide switches, keys, and environmental secrets.
mechanics.expression: In The Witness, interconnected rooms hide switches, keys, and environmental secrets.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience The Witness through its core puzzle loop.
